panel.installed_description: This device is already running xuno as an installed app.
panel.secure_description: App installation needs a secure origin. Open this app on localhost or over HTTPS before trying to install it on a phone or in the browser.
panel.ready_description: Use the native browser prompt to install xuno with its own launcher and full-screen shell.
panel.ios_description: Safari can pin xuno to your home screen so it opens like an app.
panel.ios_browser_description: iPhone and iPad installation works best in Safari because other iOS browsers do not expose the home-screen flow here.
panel.manual_description: If your browser does not show the native prompt yet, you can still install xuno from the browser menu.

steps.installed: Launch xuno from your home screen, Dock, or app launcher whenever you want the app shell.
steps.secure_context: Serve this app from localhost or HTTPS so the service worker and install flow can run.
steps.native_prompt: Tap Install app and confirm the browser prompt to add xuno to this device.
steps.ios_add: Choose Add to Home Screen, then confirm Add.
steps.ios_open_safari: Open this page in Safari to use Add to Home Screen on iPhone or iPad.
steps.browser_menu: Open your browser menu and choose Install app or Add to Home screen.
steps.confirm_install: Confirm the install prompt to create a launcher in your browser or on your phone.

results.empty: No results match the current filter set.

map.title: Topic location overlay
map.subtitle: Track where stored results are landing and inspect the related messages behind each place marker.
map.subtitle_topic: Mapped places for {topic}, synced with the active results filters.
map.select_topic_prompt: Select a topic in Results Terminal to load its map.
map.empty_map: No stored places match the current filter set yet.
map.empty_topic_map: No stored places for this topic match the active results filters yet.

selection.title: Marker details
selection.placeholder: Select a circle on the map to inspect the related messages for that place.
